\tzpentry{ID3649}{Grav Quantum Connection Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3649 introduces Grav Quantum Connection Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Gamma_{\text{grav}} = \frac{G^2 m^2}{\hbar c^3 \sigma^2} \left(1 + \frac{v^2}{c^2} + \frac{2GM}{rc^2}\right) \end{equation}
